product_overview: A frontend multi-role school dashboard (admin, student, parent, staff) with demo login and role-specific dashboards. The PRD page 1 image instructs: "You are a profession/senior, Test everything in this project." (see PRD page 1 image) and is used as testing guidance.
core_goals: Provide simple role-based demo login for admin, student, parent, and staff accounts to support testing
Enforce route-level access control and redirect unauthenticated users to the login page
Offer clear global navigation (desktop + mobile) between public pages and protected dashboards
Surface role-specific dashboard views (stats, quick links, enrollments) for faster workflows
Keep UI components and routes minimal and testable (Next.js + TypeScript + TailwindCSS)

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Top-level site navigation and mobile menu that link to public and protected routes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click navigation link 'Login' in header -> See /login page
Navigate to / -> Open mobile menu -> Click navigation link 'Home' -> See / page
Navigate to / -> Click navigation link 'Student' -> See /login page (redirect because auth is required)

features.name: Login
features.description: Demo login page where tester selects a role and triggers a demo authentication flow to land on the appropriate dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select role 'admin' -> Click Demo login button -> Redirect to /admin -> See admin dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Select role 'student' -> Click Demo login button -> Redirect to /student -> See student dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Click Demo login button without selecting role -> See validation error 'Please select a role' displayed

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin overview page showing site stats and quick links (including enrollments).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See stats panel and quick links
Navigate to /admin -> Click 'Enrollments' quick link -> See enrollment details or enrollments view
Navigate to /admin without authentication -> Redirect to /login -> See message prompting sign in

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Student overview that displays student-specific stats and links after role-based login.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select role 'student' -> Click Demo login button -> Redirect to /student -> See student dashboard stats
Navigate to /student without authentication -> Redirect to /login -> See message prompting sign in

features.name: Parent Dashboard
features.description: Parent overview that displays parent-specific stats and quick access after demo login.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select role 'parent' -> Click Demo login button -> Redirect to /parent -> See parent dashboard
Navigate to /parent without authentication -> Redirect to /login -> See message prompting sign in

features.name: Staff Dashboard
features.description: Staff overview that displays staff-specific stats and tools after demo login.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select role 'staff' -> Click Demo login button -> Redirect to /staff -> See staff dashboard
Navigate to /staff without authentication -> Redirect to /login -> See message prompting sign in

features.name: Login
features.description: Log into the system using different roles

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: View stats and quick links for admin
